slices.focus: Rediscovering old legal and civic procedurals
slices.summary: Rediscovered love for older legal and civic procedurals after a backyard movie night with Lena. Discussed how this signals widening mental space and how to sustain the interest without over-engineering leisure into another optimization project.
open_loops: Whether this new interest will stick or become another abandoned phase
Need to curate a list of older procedurals sorted by mood categories
Avoid turning leisure into another solo optimization project
decisions: Declare older legal and civic procedurals an active preference, not a fluke
Create a short mood-sorted list of procedurals to bypass decision fatigue
Set up a home movie night and leave the door open for another neighbor outing
